WTFB v0.5

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 747
Recv ID: 767
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 58
Func Name: NAV

  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "CAP",
    "soft": "AI_PRJ_ALPINE_LINUX_16.0F19     ",
    "version": "0025_161013                     "
  }
]

      },

        "firstbyte": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.pendingDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  }
